{{Quote|Good luck out there.|Rhys bids farewell to a customer|<ref name="TOR" />}}
'''Rhys''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] in the [[Republic Army|army]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Galactic War]] against the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]]. During the war he worked as a light [[Armor/Legends|armor]] [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] where he ran a stall within the Republic controlled [[Shipwright Auxiliary Spaceport]]. Rhys had [[Color/Legends|red]] hair, green [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and fair skin. While at his stall he wore a white, blue and brown uniform including a helmet.<ref name="TOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sergeant Rhys appeared in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'', released by [[BioWare]] in [[2011]], as a Light Armor Vendor for Republic players on Corellia.<ref name="TOR" /> With the release of Game Update 4.0 on [[October 20]], [[2015]],<ref name="4.0">{{TORweb|url=patchnotes/10202015/game-update-4.0-knights-fallen-empire-early-access|text=Game Update 4.0: Knights of the Fallen Empire Early Access Patch Notes}}</ref> Rhys was removed from the game along with the rest of the Light Armor Vendors.<ref name="TOR" /> His position is also marked on a map in ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Explorer's Guide]]'', a game guide released by [[Prima Games]].<ref name="Explorer">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Explorer's Guide]]''</ref>
